tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$102.50 est. (+0.8% Apr 23; last confirmed $101.73 TradingEconomics Apr 22). IRGC seized MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in Hormuz (Apr 22) hours after ceasefire extension — extension 'has no meaning' per Iran. Blockade intact; Iran holds 3 Western commercial vessels; no Hormuz reopening; P&I suspended. Stress scenario dominant (50%): kinetic stalemate. Tail (40%): ceasefire collapse on seizure escalation. Hold Brent long at medium conviction. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + Hormuz reopening (Brent sub-$88). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$102.50 est. (+0.8% Apr 23); ASEAN Energy Equities ~149.5 est. (+1.7%); ASEAN Banks ~173.0 est. (-1.1%). iTraxx Asia IG ~198bp (+8bp); ASEAN HY ~575bp (+15bp). IRGC seized MSC vessels in Hormuz (Apr 22) — extension 'has no meaning.' Maintain ASEAN Energy long (stress scenario $95-115 Brent); re-add ASEAN Banks underweight at full size (spreads widening again — 198bp vs pre-crisis 106bp). Tail (40%) points to $130+ Brent and 230-260bp iTraxx. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Reopen on Hormuz Re-Closure and Touska Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.65 est. (+0.4% Apr 23). IRGC ship seizures (Apr 22) raise tail probability to 40% — maintain USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay and retain half-size NDF. Blockade intact; Iran holds 3 Western vessels; full PHP recovery capped. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Rebuild on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,050 est. (+0.9% Apr 23); Indonesia 10Y ~7.25% est. (+7bp). ICP overshoot ~$32.50/bbl at Brent ~$102.50 — significant fiscal pressure. IRGC ship seizures raise tail to 40%; IDR recovery capped. Hold IDR short at half-size; USD Call/IDR Put 17,500 strike retains value. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Re-add at 205bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~198bp (+8bp Apr 23); ASEAN HY ~575bp (+15bp). IRGC seized MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in Hormuz (Apr 22) — ceasefire fracturing; spreads widening again. Re-add CDS protection to full size — 198bp vs pre-crisis 106bp; tail (40%) targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (50%) stabilises 190-215bp. Retain Sapura / Hyflux paper short. Remove at confirmed deal + Hormuz reopening + spreads below 160bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Rebuild on Hormuz Re-Closure
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$17.00 est. (+7.5% Apr 23; last confirmed $15.81 TradingEconomics Apr 21); TTF ~€43.50 est. (+2.6%). IRGC seized MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in Hormuz (Apr 22) — LNG supply disruption risk rises; Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026. Rebuild JKM long to full size on seizure-driven LNG disruption. TTF counter-leg: maintain short as European spot premium compresses vs Asia. Stress scenario target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30 on ceasefire collapse (40%). Stop at confirmed Hormuz reopening + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~198bp (+8bp Apr 23) — spreads widening on IRGC ship seizures. Window from ceasefire extension is closing; execute any residual private placements immediately. IRGC seized MSC Francesca + Epaminondas hours after extension; tail (40%) targets 230-260bp. Do not wait for further normalisation.

Brent ~$102.50 est. (+0.8% Apr 23); THB ~33.80 est. (+0.4%); Thailand 10Y ~2.32% (+7bp). IRGC ship seizures (Apr 22) raise tail to 40%; PTTEP upstream EBITDA strong at current oil prices. Execute USD H2 prefunding now — window narrowing as spreads re-widen. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review urgent given Touska seizure precedent and GL U expiry Apr 19.

iTraxx Asia IG ~198bp (+8bp Apr 23); USD/SGD ~1.2910 (+0.3%); Brent ~$102.50 est. IRGC ship seizures widen spreads — working capital input cost pressure resurfaces. Maintain full USD hedging; revolving-credit expansion window narrowing as spreads re-widen. Tail (40%) targets spreads 230bp+; execute revolving-credit expansion without delay.

ASEAN HY ~575bp (+15bp Apr 23); Brent ~$102.50 est. IRGC ship seizures widen ASEAN HY — Hyflux desalination power cost trajectory re-escalates. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms before window closes further. Tail (40%) pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp; do not assume ceasefire extension implies resolution.
